description: Color Hue returns a color with a given hue value. This is equivalent to using HSV To Color with a value and saturation equal to 1.

fields.Hue: The hue to get a color for. Values must be in the range [0, 1], values outside this range are wrapped to it. For example a value of 1.5 gives the same result as 0.5.
fields.* ([[Type:Color|Color]]):
The resulting color.

File:Protoflux Color Hue.webp|A simple example of a few hue values being ran through the Color Hue node
